channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Notre sélection des 7 meilleures offres d’aspirateur robot et balais laveurs lors des French Days 2026
item.description: Vous êtes à la recherche d'un nouveau compagnon pour le ménage de votre domicile ? Lors des French Days 2026, les aspirateurs robots et les balais laveurs sont eux aussi mis en avant dans les diverses promotions. Voici les meilleures offres disponibles.

item.title: What You Need to Know About the Foreign-Made Router Ban in the US
item.description: The FCC banned the sale of new consumer-grade Wi-Fi routers and mobile hot spots manufactured outside the US. Here’s what it means for you.

item.title: Mayor of Kingstown season 5 — everything we know so far about the hit Taylor Sheridan show's final series
item.description: Mayor of Kingstown season 5 will sadly be the Taylor Sheridan show's final installment — here's everything we know so far about its Paramount+ return.

item.title: Undead co-op shooters, gorgeous hack-and-slash action and other new indie games worth checking out
item.description: Plus, more Ball x Pit is never a bad thing.

item.title: 'That is why it is important to have full control': Dutch government launches its own self-hosted GitHub alternative in the latest blast against US tech giants such as Microsoft
item.description: The Netherlands has launched a self-hosted Git platform to gain control over code infrastructure, reduce reliance on external providers, and support collaboration.

item.title: Comment patcher Copy Fail sur son Linux en quelques minutes
item.description: Une faille vieille de neuf ans permet à n'importe quel utilisateur local de prendre le contrôle root d'un Linux. Si vous avez un serveur, un Raspberry Pi qui traîne ou un PC sous Ubuntu, vous êtes concerné.

item.title: Brentford vs West Ham FREE Live Streams: How to watch Premier League 2025/26 from anywhere in the world
item.description: All the ways to watch Brentford vs West Ham live streams online and from anywhere ahead of a huge London derby for both clubs.

item.title: How to watch Leinster vs Toulon: Free Streams & TV Channels for 2025/26 Investec Champions Cup semi-final
item.description: All the ways to watch Leinster vs Toulon live streams online – including for FREE – as Dublin's Aviva Stadium hosts the 2025/26 Champions Cup semi-final.

item.title: 'Light years ahead of the rest of the world': China shows off the future of EV batteries at the Beijing Auto Show — as CATL and BYD race to cut charging times down to just five minutes
item.description: The Beijing Auto Show played host to numerous rapid-charging demos, as China looks to cut EV charging time to a minimum

item.title: MacBook Neo vs MacBook Air : 500 € d’écart, mais combien de compromis ?
item.description: Le MacBook Neo coûte 500 € de moins que le MacBook Air M5. Sur le papier, c'est tentant. Sur le terrain, l'addition se paie ailleurs, et nos confrères de Frandroid ont passé une semaine à la documenter.

item.title: Hausse de prix imminente sur les MacBook : faut-il acheter maintenant ?
item.description: Apple vient de battre son record de chiffre d'affaires pour un trimestre de mars, et pourtant Tim Cook prévient : les prix des Mac vont grimper. La faute à la mémoire, devenue l'or noir de l'IA.

item.title: 8 Best Travel Adapters (2026), Tested and Reviewed
item.description: When going abroad, the right plugs are essential to keep your gadgets charged. These are my favorite travel adapters and chargers.

item.title: Disneyland Now Uses Face Recognition on Visitors
item.description: Plus: The NSA tests Anthropic’s Mythos Preview to find vulnerabilities, a Finnish teen is charged over the Scattered Spider hacking spree, and more.

item.title: Apple AirPods Max 2 Review: The Best Over-Ears for iOS
item.description: If you're an iPhone user, the Apple AirPods Max 2 are still the best over-ear headphones you can buy.

item.title: Ottocast Cabin Care Wireless CarPlay Adapter Review: Tiny Tracker
item.description: The owl-shaped Ottocast Cabin Care adapter turns your vehicle's CarPlay screen into a back seat camera.

item.title: Seule la batterie différencie ces deux smartphones Motorola : que révèlent nos tests d’autonomie ?
item.description: Avez-vous entendu parler du Edge 70 Fusion ? Ce smartphone de Motorola, que nous allons bientôt tester, a été décliné par la marque en une version Power dotée d’une batterie plus importante. Nous avons décidé de tester leur autonomie au 01lab, pour comparer les résultats des deux smartphones.

item.title: A Professional Bike Fitting Will Make You Want to Ride Even More
item.description: Getting an assessment and suggestions from a pro puts you in the right position and gets you as comfortable as can be. If you ride a lot, it's worth the investment.

item.title: How to Buy a Bike That’s the Right Size for You
item.description: Shopping for a bike that fits your body and suits your needs typically involves a lot of trial and error. Here’s our advice on how to make the process—and your ride—as painless as possible.

item.title: This NASA astronaut has spent years shaping the future of spaceflight. Now he’s finally heading to orbit
item.description: Anil Menon discusses his upcoming ISS mission, commercial space stations, and the unanswered medical questions of life in microgravity. Anil Menon might have the world’s spaciest resume. After several years as a NASA flight surgeon, he became SpaceX’s medical director in 2018, where he authored research on the effects of space on the human body. In 2021, he was selected as a NASA astronaut and has spent the past several years training for his own journey to space. Along the way, he also supported his wife, Anna Menon, who traveled to space on a private mission in 2024 and was herself selected ...

item.title: Housing market power divide: States where buyers can find the most, and least, inventory right now
item.description: National active listings are up 4.6% year over year—a sharply decelerated rate from a year earlier, when listings were up 30.6%. Want more housing market stories from Lance Lambert’s ResiClub in your inbox? Subscribe to the ResiClub newsletter.

item.title: Fin de OnePlus en Europe : restructuration, suivi clientèle tout ce qu’il faut savoir
item.description: La marque OnePlus en Europe connaît de nouvelles turbulences avec un futur incertain. Les informations que nous avons reçues évoquent une restructuration mais qu'en est-il réellement ? Voici notre récapitulatif complet de la situation du constructeur chinois.
